ab: Ciwas, niya su sali aw?
en: Ciwas, are you home?

ab: hu, haziy kayup sali.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Yuma, niya su sali aw?
en: lawa , are you home?

ab: ungat sali Yuma yu! kuzing ga Kagaw nanu ku yuwaw su pi? muwah Yuma la ga kiyalaw mu la.
ch: B:Yuma不在家耶!我是Kawgaw，有什麼事嗎?回來我會轉告Yuma。
en: Yuma is not at home. I am Kawgaw. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: ima simu?
en: Who are you?

ab: yaki, sami ga Yuma ki Iwan, ragiy sami gamiyah su lihun!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Yuma和Iwan，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Yuma and Iwan, please open the door for us.

ab: ima sa?
en: Who is it?

ab: kuzing ga Buya, muwah kung hamkani i Pihaw ki.
en: I am Buya, I am here for Pihaw.

ab: basiya su ini uwah la, sanun misu balay la.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Laway, muwah kung hamkani isu manaw.
en: Laway, I am here to play with you.

ab: haziy uwah sahuy, basiya misu nawun la.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: haniy ga panuhiy mu na ngahi, kani tikay han!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: tiya kinsabing ngahi hani.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: inah! haniy ga panuhiy mu na babuway, kani tilay muriy.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: tiya kinsabing ku babuway hani.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: tala’ung, hani ga panuhiy mu na tiyay kani tikay muriy!
ch: A:請坐!這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: um! sabing balay ku tiyay hani.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: pakani su yutak aw?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: ini kung kani su yutak, mani kung su ringo la ga asa la.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: pakani su pinkan aw?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: aw, sagalan mu.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: pata kung su babuway ru kani ki.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: mahuway su, payux buw niya ku babuway hani.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: bi’ay misu su siya nabuw ki.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: mahuway su.
en: Thank you.

ab: kapayux tikay mani, payux ku tanahuk mu na rami.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: um! balayi balay sawkan ru balay ni’un uziy.
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: kapayux mani, payux niya hani na.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: ayat kung pabaga ki!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: kapayux mani, payux niya hani na.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: payux waya mu ni’un la, ayat kung pakani la.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
